question: Based on the chart of rainfall (mm) over the past 14 days, which statement about total rainfall is most accurate?

options.A: Total rainfall was greater during the first 7 days than during the last 7 days.
options.B: Total rainfall was greater during the last 7 days than during the first 7 days.
options.C: Total rainfall was roughly the same in the first 7 days and the last 7 days.
options.D: There is not enough information to compare rainfall totals between the first 7 days and the last 7 days.

explanation: The x‑axis order has been scrambled: the bars are not shown in true chronological sequence. If you reorder the days from Day 1 to Day 14 and sum the first and last 7 days, you see that the last segment actually has the greater total. Judging only from the apparent left‑to‑right pattern would give the wrong conclusion.
